nasb.text: Now the reason I have come to speak this word to my lord the king is that the people have made me afraid; so your maidservant said, ‘Let me now speak to the king, perhaps the king will perform the request of his maidservant.

esv.text: Now I have come to say this to my lord the king because the people have made me afraid, and your servant thought, ‘I will speak to the king; it may be that the king will perform the request of his servant.

cnv.text: 現在我來對我主我王說這話，是因為眾民使我害怕，所以婢女想：‘現在我要對王說，也許王會成全婢女所求的。’

ccb.text: 我向我主我王说出这番话，是因为人们恐吓我。我想，不如向王请命，也许王会成全婢女的心愿。
